finding: `tasks scope add --add <csv>` can preserve stray quote characters in amendment history when comma-separated paths are passed through PowerShell/JSON surfaces.
expectedBehavior: Scope amendment history should store normalized exact paths without shell quote artifacts, regardless of shell.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed by normalizing boundary quote artifacts before splitting `--add` / `--paths` CSV values and again per token; regression covers quoted CSV plus leading-only and trailing-only quote artifacts so amendment history receives clean paths. Validators: `node --strip-types tests/cli/task-scope-amendment.test.ts`; `npm run typecheck`; `npm run check:encoding:touched -- --files docs/governance/atm-bug-and-optimization-backlog.md packages/cli/src/commands/tasks/task-option-parsers.ts tests/cli/task-scope-amendment.test.ts`; `git diff --check -- ...`.
